name: atlassian
description: Codex packaging for Atlassian Rovo MCP workflows across Jira, Confluence, and Compass.

interface.shortDescription: Use Jira, Confluence, and Compass from Codex
interface.longDescription: A Codex-only packaging of Atlassian Rovo MCP workflows. It bundles reusable skills for searching company knowledge, turning specs or meeting notes into Jira work, querying Jira tickets by board and sprint, triaging issues, and generating status reports once the Atlassian MCP server is connected in Codex.
defaultPrompt: Search Confluence and Jira for onboarding docs
Turn this spec into a Jira epic and ticket breakdown
Show me my tickets for the active sprint on the mobile board
Generate a weekly status report from Jira
